description: Deferred from bl-be5f. Spec bl-2e26 §13: a sync/prime POST payload carries 'previous_commit/commit — the operating branch HEAD before and after the op' (metadata still absent — no §5 trailer). Today Engine::diffless passes None for sealed to both phases, so post gets no commit facts. No shipped plugin reads them (tracker push + delivery re-materialize don't need them), so deferred; a future sync/post cache-rebuild plugin will. Requires Engine::diffless to capture operating HEAD before/after pre and thread a metadata-less facts shape to post.
title: Diffless post-wire commit/previous_commit facts (§13)
